rules.name: tooling_api_required_for_metadata
rules.message: Metadata objects (FlowDefinitionView, FlexiPage, Layout, etc.) require --use-tooling-api flag

rules.name: api_name_not_developer_name
rules.description: Use DeveloperName for FlowDefinitionView, not ApiName
rules.remediation: Replace ApiName with DeveloperName in query

rules.name: limit_clause_recommended
rules.description: Large queries should include LIMIT clause
rules.warning: Query does not include LIMIT clause - may return large result set
rules.remediation: Add LIMIT clause to prevent timeout or memory issues

rules.name: bulk_flag_deprecated_v2125
rules.description: sf data query --bulk was removed in SF CLI v2.125+
rules.message: Use sf data export bulk instead of sf data query --bulk on SF CLI v2.125+
rules.remediation: Replace sf data query --bulk with sf data export bulk --query ...

rules.name: flow_version_status_inactive_invalid
rules.message: FlowVersionStatus only supports Active, Draft, and Obsolete
rules.remediation: Replace 'Inactive' with Draft or use FlowDefinition tooling updates for deactivation

rules.name: production_requires_tests
rules.remediation: Set --test-level to RunLocalTests or RunAllTestsInOrg for production

rules.name: specified_tests_requires_tests_param
rules.remediation: Add --tests parameter with comma-separated test class names

sf_data_upsert.description: Salesforce bulk data upsert tool contract

rules.name: update_requires_external_id
rules.warning: Upsert operations should specify --external-id for matching records
rules.remediation: Add --external-id parameter to specify matching field (default: Id)

rules.name: filter_non_writeable_field_types
rules.description: Filter formula and rollup fields before DML
rules.warning: Formula and rollup fields should be excluded from upsert payloads
rules.remediation: Describe the object first and exclude calculated or summary fields from the CSV

sf_data_update_flow_definition.description: Salesforce Tooling API contract for FlowDefinition deactivation/reactivation
